user_outcome: CLI, autonomous-loop and MCP track-merge paths use the same provenance, freshness, composition and readiness authorities on normal and idempotent execution.
rationale: Sworn currently has three track-merge implementations with different gates. This slice makes one operation own the merge transaction and requires every adapter to pass C-03 and C-07 through C-09 before both a new merge and an already-merged success.
in_scope: Create one track-merge operation that resolves the committed board, exact retained track ref, release-wt ref, owner-track statuses, reports, evidence intervals, rollback proofs, and C-07 declarations from C-03-authorized refs.

Require every slice to satisfy C-09, validate C-08 freshness, and compose every declared shared file to its canonical C-07 blob before creating a two-parent integration whose first parent is the validated release-wt head and second parent is the retained board-declared track head.

Install canonical shared blobs in both index and worktree during forward synchronization or merge, independent of an ordinary Git driver result; block every undeclared production conflict and return it to re-planning.

Make sworn merge-track, the parallel autonomous loop's ProductionMergeTrack path, and MCP approve_merge call the same operation with equivalent structured outcomes and fail-closed exit or tool behavior.

When S11 returns the sole recoverable recognized-sync invalidation plan, atomically write the exact status/journal transition, commit it locally on the track branch, preserve remote track and release-wt refs, return non-success, and route to re-plan; this is a lifecycle durability action, not an integration merge.

On an already-merged or interrupted rerun, revalidate the complete protocol, status, report, freshness, rollback, composition, parent topology, and resulting tree before reporting idempotent success; never short-circuit on ancestry or displayed state alone.
out_of_scope: Release-wt to integration-branch merge belongs to S16-release-ship-transitions.
Pre-cutover ship and post-deployment status mutation belong to S16-release-ship-transitions.
The adapter does not resolve undeclared production conflicts, synthesize a shared declaration, rewrite stale reports, or waive readiness.
Planner mutation and track propagation belong to S17-engine-replan-migration.

effort_complexity.rationale: Three live entry points must converge on an atomic Git transaction whose parent topology and tree are part of protocol evidence.

risks.description: One adapter keeps its legacy state-only or ordinary-git merge path and bypasses canonical readiness or composition.
risks.mitigation: Delete adapter-local merge predicates, inject the shared operation, and run one scenario table through CLI, autonomous-loop, and MCP entry points.

risks.description: An idempotent rerun trusts that the track is already an ancestor even though evidence or the integration tree was rewritten.
risks.mitigation: The idempotent result must re-run C-03/C-07/C-08/C-09 and validate the exact two-parent integration and tree before success.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN sworn merge-track receives a T6 track cut from the exact C-13-activated release-wt head whose slices satisfy C-09 and whose retained head, intervals, sync provenance, rollback facts, and shared declarations satisfy C-03/C-07/C-08 THE SYSTEM SHALL create one two-parent integration with validated release-wt as parent 1, retained track head as parent 2, and the exact canonical composed tree, then return exit 0; planning authority SHALL block before merge (C-03, C-07, C-08, C-09, C-13, N-06, N-07, N-08, N-09, N-10).

WHEN the autonomous parallel loop and MCP approve_merge execute the same valid fixture THE SYSTEM SHALL call the same track-merge operation, produce the same integration commit parents and tree as AC-01, and expose equivalent success; no adapter SHALL invoke ordinary merge directly (C-07, C-08, C-09, N-09).

IF any slice is not C-09 ready, protocol refs diverge, a report/provenance identity is stale, rollback equality fails, shared composition conflicts, an undeclared conflict exists, or C-08 reports later overlap/unrecognized/shipped authority THEN every CLI, loop, and MCP adapter SHALL block with no lifecycle mutation or ref advance and return the same typed gate; the only exception is AC-06's exact recoverable local invalidation commit (C-03, C-07, C-08, C-09, N-06, N-07, N-08).

WHEN any adapter reruns after the exact track integration already exists THE SYSTEM SHALL revalidate every C-03, C-07, C-08, and C-09 input plus commit parents and tree before returning idempotent success; IF any current authority or integrated identity differs THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL block rather than trust ancestry or displayed state (N-09, N-10).

WHEN a declared shared path's ordinary Git merge conflicts or produces driver-dependent bytes but C-07 produces one canonical blob THE SYSTEM SHALL install that exact blob in index and worktree and complete the valid track integration; IF C-07 itself conflicts THE SYSTEM SHALL abort and preserve the pre-operation ref, index, and worktree (C-07, N-08).

WHEN S11 classifies a recognized intersecting post-frontier synchronization whose invalidated candidate set is disjoint from all later authority THE SYSTEM SHALL preserve ledger/adjudication, clear implementation_head, set maintainability re_slice_required plus overall failed_verification/verification fail, persist exact invalidated_review_head, invalidating_sync_merge, and parent-2 rollback_baseline_commit in status/journal, create one one-parent local track commit, leave the remote track at that commit's parent and release-wt unchanged, return non-success, and route every adapter to re-plan; rerun SHALL revalidate that exact local/remote split without push, and C-12 SHALL preserve the invalidation commit as the re-plan target's expected local parent while compare-and-swap advancing the remote from its separately declared expected parent (C-08, C-12, N-06, N-07, N-09, N-10).
